description: Jeremy, founder of Remark, discusses the vision for core banking and real world assets, emphasizing the need for modernization in banking through blockchain technology. He introduces Solstice, a network designed to enhance banking efficiency by leveraging tokenized deposits and bridging physical and digital assets.
topic_summary: At [t=5:20], Jeremy introduces the need for modern banking solutions. He explains the limitations of current banking systems at [t=74:50] and presents Solstice as a transformative solution at [t=235:20]. The network aims to streamline banking operations and integrate real world assets efficiently.
